title: DragN's Valiant Vehicles!
description: A small mod that adds a few new vehicles!
body:
## Welcome to Valiant Vehicles!

A small mod adding a few new types of vehicles, and their crafting recipes.

### The addition list:

-Modern Car

-Classic car

-SUV

-Pickup Truck

-Sports Car

-Motorcycle

<>

Cars and SUVs can hold up to four players, whilst Pickup Trucks can hold up to two.

Each vehicle has it's own storage! Cars have 27 slots, SUVs have 36 slots, and trucks have a whopping 54 slots, to carry all of your on-the-road needs!

### All vehicles can also be dyed in all 16 vanilla dye colors!


**Worry not, there are more colors to come :)**



## Controls
Shift + Right Click: Open Storage

Shift + Right Click (+ Dye): Dye Vehicle

<>

Suggested: JEI (For recipes!)

[![Partner](https://i.imgur.com/oxzCr5w.png)](https://billing.kinetichosting.net/aff.php?aff=1122)
